name: maildrop
description: ✉️ A simple self hostable email service
readme_summary: Maildrop is a self-hostable email service that allows users to receive emails on any address within their domain. It's designed for managing multiple email addresses easily, signing up for services without using a primary email, and creating multiple website accounts.
primary_use_case: To provide a simple, self-hostable email service for managing disposable or custom email addresses for various online activities.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, stylized mailbox overflowing with a cascade of colorful envelopes, each uniquely addressed to different fictional services or websites. A friendly, robotic hand is shown sorting these envelopes with precision, placing them into distinct compartments labeled with abstract icons representing online accounts. Subtle digital particles and glowing data streams flow from the hand to the envelopes, symbolizing the automated generation and management of email addresses. The background is a clean, minimalist digital interface, hinting at the Maildrop application. The overall mood is organized and efficient, with a bright, inviting color palette. 3D isometric illustration style.

name: face_looker
description: Generate AI-powered gaze-tracking face images and create interactive React components that follow the cursor.
readme_summary: Face Looker generates AI-powered gaze-tracking face images and provides an interactive React component that makes a face follow the user's cursor in real-time. It offers two methods for image generation: an easy-to-use Replicate model and a more advanced Python script for greater control.
key_features: Generate AI-powered face images with varying gaze directions
Create interactive React components that follow cursor movement
Option to use a Replicate model for easy generation
Option to use a Python script for advanced control over generation
Generates a sprite/grid sheet of faces
Provides vanilla HTML, JS, and CSS for effect rendering
primary_use_case: Creating engaging and interactive UI elements such as portfolio headers, avatars, or dynamic visual components.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, friendly robot character with large, expressive eyes is sitting at a desk. Its eyes are dynamically tracking the movement of a small, glowing cursor that hovers around the desk. On the desk, there are two distinct visual elements: on one side, a pile of diverse photographic portraits, and on the other, a single, large sprite sheet displaying numerous variations of the robot's face, each with a different gaze direction. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets float around the robot, connecting the scene to technology. The overall mood is creative and engaging, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with bright, inviting colors.

name: Alexandrie
description: 📚 The open-source, offline-first Notion, Obsidian & Confluence alternative. Advanced Markdown, multi-tenant teams, OIDC/SSO, and local S3 backups. Deploy in one command.
readme_summary: Alexandrie is an open-source, self-hosted knowledge base and wiki platform that serves as an alternative to tools like Notion and Confluence. It offers advanced Markdown editing, offline-first capabilities, team collaboration features, and robust security options like OIDC/SSO.
key_features: Advanced Markdown Engine (LaTeX, custom containers, checkboxes, frames, snippets, diagrams)
Granular Organization (Teams, Workspaces, Categories, nested Documents)
Command Center (Ctrl+K) for navigation and actions
primary_use_case: Self-hosted knowledge management and team collaboration platform.
cover_image_prompt: A wise librarian meticulously organizing a vast, interconnected library where each book represents a piece of knowledge. The librarian uses a magical quill that can instantly transform scribbled notes into beautifully rendered diagrams and complex equations, with digital particles of information flowing between books. Subtle holographic interfaces displaying organizational hierarchies and search results hover around the librarian. The library itself has a warm, inviting glow, with elements of both ancient scrolls and modern digital displays. The overall scene should convey organized knowledge, powerful editing capabilities, and seamless access, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with rich details and a clean, organized composition.
